deleteOrigin.description: Indicate if data described in source uri shall be deleted after ingestion. Source uri must be a cloud storage uri. If deletion failed, ingestion status is set to `FAILED`.

nativeCopy.description: Indicate if data described in source uri shall be copied for archive after ingestion. If copy failed, ingestion status is set to `FAILED`.

sourceUri.description: Uri of the resource to ingest. The uri must point to the main file of the resource.
